name: Brad Hicks
background: Brad Hicks is President of Highway Services. He joined the company in 1996 and has held several executive positions in Highway Services and Dedicated Contract Services.

company_affiliations.name: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President of Dedicated Contract Services (Current); previously President of Highway Services, Executive Vice President of People, and EVP of Dedicated Contract Services.
